CustomField.description: When enabled, year-based GAU Allocation rollup fields use the org's fiscal year instead of the calendar year. Configure in Setup > Company Information > Fiscal Year. Custom Fiscal Year settings are NOT supported. This is separate from the Households Settings fiscal year setting and applies only to allocation-specific rollups.
CustomField.inlineHelpText: Use fiscal year instead of calendar year for GAU Allocation rollups. Custom Fiscal Years are not supported.
CustomField.label: Use Fiscal Year for Rollups
